{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Armored Giant
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|An armored giant with a face made of metal gears stepped through an irregular Gate.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The armored giant's helmet reveals thousands of metal gears instead of a face.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
